title: 如果撐良心醫生呢單都推唔到上熱門，以後唔好叫連登仔！

replies.msg:
前幾日 Dr. Ray 係自己個 Facebook Page - "Dr. Ray 的急症室迎送生涯"，證實咗女示威者被強姦及性侵並非傳言。掟完粒核彈之後Dr. Ray 被藍絲瘋狂攻擊。連登仔鍵戰和理非冷氣軍師同我全部即刻出嚟幫拖，send email 去醫管局幫良心醫生。下面係 send 俾醫管局嘅中英文版本Sample，即刻同我做！！！！！！！！！

To:
mc-complaint@dh.gov.hk

cc:
ccekcc@ha.org.hk
hohf@ha.org.hk
ceooffice@ha.gov.hk

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing in response to any complaints made against the post published in the evening of 02-11-2019 on facebook page "Dr. Ray 的急症室迎送生涯". I think some overreacted people have raised groundless and non-sense complaints against a personal opinion on this issue. I strongly urge any departments and personnels to handle this issue with extra care professionally, as it may potentially harm the freedom of speech of your employees on multi-media platform.

The exact wordings used on the post were to claim the top two items from a survey to be not rumours. According to the google dictionary, rumour is something that is currently uncertain or doubtful. That said, the user didnt declare those items to be true or false. He just said those are not rumours.

Some people assume "non-rumour" is identical to true, which is pretty hilarious. I can declare a lot of things not to be rumours, eventually they can still be false and I mean it.

In the post, I dont see any personal details related to the "non-rumour" being disclosed. Nether do I see him further elaborate any information nor spread hatred. Actually, what I see is one line of declaring the issue as non-rumour, followed by a promise of no discussion beyond that point.

Doctor is a valuable resource to a society. We are not going to ask every doctor to clarify his personal opinion on facebook, simply because some uneducated and illogical people are self-triggered for no reason.

Regards,
Xxxxxxx

drafted for reference , 可自己改下：

致香港醫務委員會：

本人是xxx先生/小姐，普通香港市民。得知網上有指控 “ Dr ray 的急症室迎送生涯” 煽動市民和仇警言論，本人認為指控完全無理。透過各大傳媒，市民都可見到警察濫用暴力，於傳媒面前的鏡頭面前都可以虐打市民，毫無節制地濫用暴力，射催淚彈以及其他子彈。香港市民對警察零信任及仇恨警察，當然不會是因為Dr.Ray 的Facebook post 而引起。除非委員都對時事不聞不問，否則指控Dr. Ray Facebook post 煽動市民仇警，未免太誇大他的影響力了。


有關女示威者受到性侵犯及強姦。警察於傳媒鏡頭面前都已經對女示威者作出性侵犯，實在難以令人相信在鏡頭背後警察沒有做其他侵犯行為。我本人絕對相信有性侵同強姦女示威者？ “Dr. Ray 急症室迎送生涯“ 只是一個 Facebook page ，作者冇指出自己係醫管局嘅醫生，沒有講明消息來源，只係話指控一二不是傳言。說實話，沒有這個post 我都知道這不是傳言。


醫委會對醫生作出處分要基於實質證據證明醫生有專業失德。如果醫委會因為一個Facebook post 處分有關醫生，本人認為指控實在無理及缺乏實質證據，有損醫委會的專業性。如醫委會淪為政治工具，有關醫生被處分，本人一定會跟進有關作決定的委員的名單，公諸於世，遺臭萬年。

xxx先生/小姐

光復香港
時代革命
Free HongKong
Revolution of Our Time
Someone move on, but not us

推

replies.msg:
Btw those blue ribbons cannot raise a complaint to the Facebook page, they are directly complaint against Dr Ray Leung s medical license
It really depends on if medical practioner breech the professional code of conduct (Red books)
Somehow the accusation either points towards
1. Breeching patient confidentiality
2. Spreading wrong medical msg to public
In general 1 cannot stand unless identifiable details specific to a personalle is disclosed by the doctor
So blue ribbons point specific to 2
But in this sense it is even more difficult to be judge by the medical Council in such a circumstance

前幾日 Dr. Ray 係自己個 Facebook Page - "Dr. Ray 的急症室迎送生涯"，證實咗女示威者被強姦及性侵並非傳言。掟完粒核彈之後Dr. Ray 被藍絲瘋狂攻擊。連登仔鍵戰和理非冷氣軍師同我全部即刻出嚟幫拖，send email 去醫管局幫良心醫生。下面係 send 俾醫管局嘅中英文版本Sample，即刻同我做！！！！！！！！！

To:
mc-complaint@dh.gov.hk

cc:
ccekcc@ha.org.hk
hohf@ha.org.hk
ceooffice@ha.gov.hk

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing in response to any complaints made against the post published in the evening of 02-11-2019 on facebook page "Dr. Ray 的急症室迎送生涯". I think some overreacted people have raised groundless and non-sense complaints against a personal opinion on this issue. I strongly urge any departments and personnels to handle this issue with extra care professionally, as it may potentially harm the freedom of speech of your employees on multi-media platform.

The exact wordings used on the post were to claim the top two items from a survey to be not rumours. According to the google dictionary, rumour is something that is currently uncertain or doubtful. That said, the user didnt declare those items to be true or false. He just said those are not rumours.

Some people assume "non-rumour" is identical to true, which is pretty hilarious. I can declare a lot of things not to be rumours, eventually they can still be false and I mean it.

In the post, I dont see any personal details related to the "non-rumour" being disclosed. Nether do I see him further elaborate any information nor spread hatred. Actually, what I see is one line of declaring the issue as non-rumour, followed by a promise of no discussion beyond that point.

Doctor is a valuable resource to a society. We are not going to ask every doctor to clarify his personal opinion on facebook, simply because some uneducated and illogical people are self-triggered for no reason.

Regards,
Xxxxxxx

drafted for reference , 可自己改下：

致香港醫務委員會：

本人是xxx先生/小姐，普通香港市民。得知網上有指控 “ Dr ray 的急症室迎送生涯” 煽動市民和仇警言論，本人認為指控完全無理。透過各大傳媒，市民都可見到警察濫用暴力，於傳媒面前的鏡頭面前都可以虐打市民，毫無節制地濫用暴力，射催淚彈以及其他子彈。香港市民對警察零信任及仇恨警察，當然不會是因為Dr.Ray 的Facebook post 而引起。除非委員都對時事不聞不問，否則指控Dr. Ray Facebook post 煽動市民仇警，未免太誇大他的影響力了。


有關女示威者受到性侵犯及強姦。警察於傳媒鏡頭面前都已經對女示威者作出性侵犯，實在難以令人相信在鏡頭背後警察沒有做其他侵犯行為。我本人絕對相信有性侵同強姦女示威者？ “Dr. Ray 急症室迎送生涯“ 只是一個 Facebook page ，作者冇指出自己係醫管局嘅醫生，沒有講明消息來源，只係話指控一二不是傳言。說實話，沒有這個post 我都知道這不是傳言。


醫委會對醫生作出處分要基於實質證據證明醫生有專業失德。如果醫委會因為一個Facebook post 處分有關醫生，本人認為指控實在無理及缺乏實質證據，有損醫委會的專業性。如醫委會淪為政治工具，有關醫生被處分，本人一定會跟進有關作決定的委員的名單，公諸於世，遺臭萬年。

xxx先生/小姐

光復香港

Revolution of Our Time

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing in response to any complaints made against the post published in the evening of 02-11-2019 on facebook page "Dr. Ray 的急症室迎送生涯". I think some overreacted people have raised groundless and non-sense complaints against a personal opinion on this issue. I strongly urge any departments and personnels to handle this issue with extra care professionally, as it may potentially harm the freedom of speech of your employees on multi-media platform.

The exact wordings used on the post were to claim the top two items from a survey to be not rumours. According to the google dictionary, rumour is something that is currently uncertain or doubtful. That said, the user didnt declare those items to be true or false. He just said those are not rumours.

Some people assume "non-rumour" is identical to true, which is pretty hilarious. I can declare a lot of things not to be rumours, eventually they can still be false and I mean it.

In the post, I dont see any personal details related to the "non-rumour" being disclosed. Nether do I see him further elaborate any information nor spread hatred. Actually, what I see is one line of declaring the issue as non-rumour, followed by a promise of no discussion beyond that point.

Doctor is a valuable resource to a society. We are not going to ask every doctor to clarify his personal opinion on facebook, simply because some uneducated and illogical people are self-triggered for no reason.

Regards,
Xxxxxxx
